name: troubleshooter
description: Systematic troubleshooting skill for diagnosing Splunk issues, suggesting fixes, checking connectivity, and analyzing internal logs.
author: ObsAI Team

default_index.description: Default internal index for log analysis

actions.name: diagnose_issue
actions.description: Systematically diagnose a Splunk issue using a decision tree based on error keywords and symptoms.

symptoms.description: Description of the issue or error message

actions.name: suggest_fix
actions.description: Suggest fixes for common Splunk errors based on error patterns and known resolutions.

error.description: The error message or error code to look up

actions.name: check_connectivity
actions.description: Generate connectivity check queries for Splunk components such as forwarders, indexers, and search heads.

actions.name: analyze_logs
actions.description: Generate SPL queries for analyzing internal Splunk logs (_internal, _audit) to identify issues.
